title: i got tired of jumping between 50 tabs to track my revenue so i built this
author: MotherLetter2227
selftext: i'm a dev with 10 years experience and i've seen too many people fail because they don't treat their work like an actual business. i spent way too long jumping between 50 tabs to track my revenue and research before i just built a dashboard to solve it. it’s called[creatoros](https://whop.com/creator-business-os/creator-business-os-dashboard/)and it’s 19 bucks on whop. it helps you see your actual profit and keep your daily streaks organized so you don't burn out. if you're tired of spinning your wheels let me know what you think of the setup.
